summary: LCX8-ACTION-0121..0128 Client account/contact/merge proof: current UI account/contact create, patch, record-action, merge review, and merge execute actions operated through browser/API with safe fixture writes, idempotency, read-back, audit proof, validation blocks, fail-closed probes, and clean browser network/console.
